fields.name: sourceControlId
fields.label: Source Control ID
fields.description: Enter the source control, safeguard, or framework-specific identifier to map from.

fields.name: targetFramework
fields.label: Target Framework
fields.description: Choose the target framework to map into, or select all supported frameworks.

fields.name: output
fields.label: Output Format
fields.description: Choose the format for the generated framework mapping output.

reportDir.label: Output Directory
reportDir.description: Optional directory where the generated framework mapping output should be written.

quiet.label: Quiet output
quiet.description: Suppress progress output while generating the framework mapping.
